ShortDescription.Value: Improves traffic flow for Transit with faster Boarding + Loading. Late passengers stop slowing transit down.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Fast Boarding [Beta]
Faster public transit boarding - Improve traffic, increase transit usage, reduce bunching of transit vehicles, reduce car demand indirectly. - The larger your city, the more this mod will help. - This build focuses on two behaviors:
- **Adjustable stop tuning** for all transit, not just buses and trains. You choose the speed. - **Skip Late Passengers** (optional) so tardy citizens can just miss a vehicle instead of holding it up.
Tune boarding speeds for:
- Bus, Rail (train, tram, subway), Water (ship, ferry), Air - Higher values shorten dwell by increasing loading speed at the stop and adjusting the boarding-time estimate used by the game. - ✅ When **Skip Late Passengers** is enabled, late passengers who are *still not ready* after *departure time* can miss that vehicle instead of holding it up. - Simple Goal: let the vehicle leave instead of waiting on passengers who are still late or far away. The game then naturally reassigns them.
### Status report included - After the city runs a bit, check the Options menu to see current status. - *Skipped* number shows how many late passengers have been skipped so the transit can leave on time. - This is a right-now snapshot; if the skip number stays at "0" for a long time, make sure the checkbox ✅ is enabled. - Use the [Stats to Log] button for more detailed stats. - Example usage: Worst stop shows over 10 minutes, check it for traffic, bad placement, not enough vehicles, or replace the stop. - This is a one-shot button that does not run in the city per-frame, so no performance impact. - When investigating, I like to click the button every 30 min, then compare the report later; it also shows exactly where the worst stops are and more.
### Notes - Compatibility: this will conflict with any mod that changes boarding behavior, like All-Aboard, so choose one or the other. - Intended to be a lighter, safer alternative than replacing the game's Transport system files. - Group boarding is handled conservatively to avoid splitting groups (they are few compared to the many single travelers). - This mod works well with `Public Works Plus` to solve many transit issues. - Save-game safe. Safe to remove anytime. - No Harmony patches; lightweight design for low overhead and negligible performance impact.
### Support and feedback If mods make the game better, give it a Like. It's an easy way to support free mods :) Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., link icons on this page.
### Credits - River-Mochi....mod author - Inspiration and thanks to bcallender's All Aboard mod and Wayze's old InstantBoarding. - yenyang.......for testing and code feedback - Neco1996......for testing - MayorCheeks...for testing
